title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text: This visualization layer is static-first and artifact-driven.

title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Host Setup (Basics)
Minimum setup for a contributor host (macOS/Linux/Windows with R + terminal):
git clone https://github.com/dMac716/coldchain-freight-montecarlo.git
cd coldchain-freight-montecarlo
cp config/gcp.example.env config/gcp.env
Rscript -e 'pkgs <- c("optparse","jsonlite","digest","testthat","leaflet"); missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]; if (length(missing) > 0) install.packages(missing, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")'
Rscript -e 'testthat::test_dir("tests/testthat")'
bash tools/smoke_test.sh
Notes: - quarto is required only to render the static site locally. - python3 is optional (used for FAF zone-name extraction when available). - bq/gsutil are optional (only for the BigQuery FAF pipeline). - Team viewing is browser-based, so PC users can use GitHub Pages output directly.

title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Data Inputs

data/derived/faf_top_od_flows.csv
data/derived/faf_zone_centroids.csv
data/derived/scenario_summary.csv (preferred; generated from available run outputs)
outputs/aggregate/results_summary.csv (fallback if scenario_summary.csv is not available)

title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Refresh UI Artifacts
Rscript tools/derive_ui_artifacts.R --top_n 200
quarto render site/ --no-clean

title: Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo
text:
Calculation Spec (What Feeds What)





flowchart LR
  A[data/inputs_local/*.csv] --> B[R/01_validate.R]
  B --> C[R/03_model_core.R deterministic equations]
  C --> D[R/04_sampling.R Monte Carlo draws]
  D --> E[R/05_histogram.R]
  E --> F[R/06_analysis.R summary stats/quantiles]
  F --> G[outputs/* results_summary.csv + metadata]
  G --> H[tools/derive_ui_artifacts.R]
  H --> I[data/derived/faf_top_od_flows.csv]
  H --> J[data/derived/faf_zone_centroids.csv]
  H --> K[data/derived/scenario_summary.csv]
  I --> L[site/viz/flow_map.qmd]
  J --> L
  K --> M[site/viz/scenario_explorer.qmd]
  G --> M

title: Team Runs
text: Run `Rscript tools/refresh_site_from_bq.R --project <GCP_PROJECT> --dataset coldchain_sim --n 50` to refresh site/data CSVs.

title: Methodology and Initial Results
text: This page summarizes the current canonical methodology and first validated artifact set committed on 2026-03-08.

title: Methodology and Initial Results
text:
Methodology (Current)

Define canonical run families in config/canonical_run_matrix.csv.
Generate paired transport Monte Carlo bundles for dry and refrigerated analyses.
Build merged LCI outputs and completeness audits.
Build presentation artifacts (figures/tables/reduced-data + route animations).
Run final validation (tools/validate_final_artifacts.sh) and release manifest generation.

Validation gates (latest canonical snapshot): - Pair 2-member invariant: PASS - Figure quality checks: PASS - Required merged LCI files: PASS

title: Methodology and Initial Results
text:
Roadmap Note
Current route animations are primarily latitude/longitude playback with cumulative counters.
Planned upgrades: - Add richer basemap/corridor context. - Add event overlays (charging, refuel, delays, stop windows). - Add stronger scenario and powertrain narrative callouts.

scenario = CENTRALIZED
powertrain = diesel
traffic_mode = stochastic
status in {OK, blank, missing/NA}
origin_network in {dry_factory_set, refrigerated_factory_set}
matched pair_id enforced (both origins required per pair)
functional_unit_basis = per_1000kcal





candidate valid rows before case selection: 400
rows in selected case before pair matching: 40
rows after matched-pair enforcement: 40
matched pairs used: 20





Graphic 1 metric: co2_per_1000kcal (kg CO2 / 1000 kcal delivered)
Graphic 2 basis: diesel gal / 1000 kcal
Graphic 2 uses propulsion and TRU components normalized per 1000 kcal from run-level values





Paired-comparison logic preserved using pair_id matching.
No cross-scenario/powertrain mixing inside the selected case.
For Graphic 2, direct CO2 propulsion/TRU split was not used when not cleanly populated; direct fuel/energy components were used per FU basis.

Last frame PNG exported for static-slide fallback.
